notes: Persistent systemic error across all 9 responses: confusion about which axis Ocean pCO2 uses and its units. The chart plots pCO2 (green) in ppm on the LEFT CO2 axis (~325-380), but most reps fabricate a right-axis pCO2 scale in 8.x pH-like values (or, in t0.7|rep2, absurd ~810-828 values). Only t0.4|rep2 correctly assigns pCO2 to the left axis. Secondary recurring errors: ocean data start year cited as 1985/1994 instead of ~1988-1990, and the inset-map marker assignment is frequently swapped (GT: Mauna Loa = red triangle, ALOHA = red dot). Lower temperature (0.1/0.4) responses were somewhat more accurate than 0.7 responses; t0.7|rep2's ~810-828 pCO2 values are the most severe single hallucination. No response was truncated, empty, or in a repetition loop.
